description_long: This is a traditional Viking longship with a sleek, elongated wooden hull and a single mast supporting a large, vertically striped sail in red and white. The boat features intricately curved bow and stern, both rising above the waterline and adorned with decorative elements typical of Norse craftsmanship. Oars are visible on both sides, indicating manual rowing as a secondary means of propulsion alongside the sail. The deck is open and flat, with wooden planks running lengthwise, and the interior is spacious enough to accommodate several people or cargo. Rigging lines are attached to the mast and hull, securing the sail and providing structural stability. The overall appearance is robust yet elegant, with a dark wood finish and a prominent, visually striking sail.
description: A Viking longship with a striped red-and-white sail, curved wooden hull, and visible oars, featuring ornate bow and stern details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed bow, full sail with red and white stripes, and the narrow profile of the hull.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the elongated hull, curved bow and stern, mast with rigging, and oars extending from the sides.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stern's upward curve, the back of the striped sail, and the symmetrical hull shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the oars, mast, and decorative hull curvature.
